items.title: 🛸 Pilot Kenneth Arnold reports seeing nine unusual objects flying near Mount Rainier, Washington. The press coins the term "flying saucers." UFO culture is born. #OnThisDay
@Gabe_Trust How can this be a turning point? It's  just a light.  It shows nothing!  Blurry nonsense!!  I despise the UFO community these days.
#ufo #uap Wasn’t expecting to be gaslit by Bob. https://t.co/2il7vNiKfp
@TheTNHoller @RepTimBurchett "Oh look, a UFO!!! Back later, dag gummit..."
@Polymarket How do ask it to look for UAP programs?  @claudeai maybe next time take a peek for us. Please
@Kagan_M_Dunlap So Jellyfish UAP? Or UAV in the "formation" of a jellyfish (whatever that means)?
